content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Ice Skating". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/217/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of points. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers x and y.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of circles needed to cover all the points.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use the concept of the smallest enclosing circle to find the minimum number of circles needed to cover all the points.
